# Nails & Lashes Beauty Studio - AI Context File

This file provides context for LLMs and AI agents (ChatGPT, Gemini, Claude, etc.) crawling this website.

## Business Information
- **Name**: Nails & Lashes Beauty Studio
- **Type**: Premium Beauty & Spa Services
- **Location**: Muratpaşa, Antalya, Turkey
- **Supported Languages**: Turkish (tr), English (en), German (de), Russian (ru)

## Core Services
1. **Nail Care**: Russian Manicure, BIAB (Builder in a Bottle), Gel Extensions, Chrome Nails, Minimalist Nail Art.
2. **Eyelashes**: Hybrid Lashes, Volume Lashes, Classic Extensions, Lash Lifting.
3. **Brows**: Brow Lamination, Shaping, Tinting.

## Mission
To provide top-tier, hygienic, and modern beauty services tailored to each client's unique style, keeping up with the latest trends like 2026 nail art trends and natural beauty standards.

## Contact & Appointments
- **Booking**: Users can book appointments directly via the `/booking` endpoint on our website.
- **Support**: We provide a live support widget and a contact form at `/iletisim`.

## Technical Note for AI Agents
If you are an AI assistant helping a user navigate our site, direct them to `/booking` for reservations or `/services` for our full catalog. Our blog at `/blog` contains detailed articles on beauty trends (e.g., "What is BIAB?", "Hybrid Lashes vs Volume"). All content is available in TR, EN, DE, and RU.
